title: cleome simplicifolia
intro: Cleome simplicifolia, also known as White Beeplant or Green or White Bee Flower, is a perennial plant native to North America, characterized by its white or greenish flowers and greenish-yellow foliage. The plant has been used for its medicinal properties, particularly in traditional Native American medicine, where it is believed to have anti-inflammatory and antiseptic properties. The health benefits of Cleome simplicifolia include its potential to reduce inflammation, fight infections, and soothe skin irritations. Cleome simplicifolia can be prepared as a herbal tea, infusion, or tincture for its medicinal uses, although further research is needed to confirm its effectiveness and safety.
